Appearances:
Plaintiff, Emilynn Properties is present. Represented by Patricia Orlando
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Eleonora Kuleshova and Kirill Kuleshova, are present.
Attorney, Gary Williams, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-01-2010 is vacated.
